title: Pins and Comments on files and pdfs
excerpt: It would be very helpful to have comments on files have more features like dropbox has where you can highlight an area with a box or shape and be more specific in comments on files. Also, the ability to leave a comment w…

posts.author: szev (Sharon Zeveney)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be very helpful to have comments on files have more features like dropbox has where you can highlight an area with a box or shape and be more specific in comments on files. Also, the ability to leave a comment when in rotated or zoomed in view. Also, the ability to zoom and manipulate the view more on the file views.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @szev! Is our file annotation feature along the lines of what you’re looking for?

  • File annotations

Let me know

posts.author: szev (Sharon Zeveney)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, that’s what I was referring to in my comments to improve even more by being able to highlight specific areas (more like Dropbox) instead of just pins and being able to zoom in and out with more co tell and being able to comment in rotated view.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hear you on this and appreciate your feedback regarding the functionality! I will relay your feedback with our team
